channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: BitGo Slashes Workforce as CEO Bets on AI, Stablecoin and Settlement Growth
item.description: BitGo said the workforce reduction is a one-time action and that no additional layoffs are currently expected....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.title: The UK softened stablecoin rules, but may still be capping its own market
item.description: The Bank of England has dropped the piece of its stablecoin plan that the industry hated most, the proposed £20,000 limit on how much sterling stablecoin any one person could hold, along with the £10 ...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
item.description: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to riv...
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Did $6B in ETF outflows just mark Bitcoin’s first Wall Street capitulation?
item.description: Over the past six weeks, investors have pulled roughly $5.94 billion from US spot Bitcoin ETFs, marking the longest unbroken run of weekly outflows since these funds first opened for business in 2024....

A flaw in the Linux kernel's traffic-control subsystem can let a local unprivileged user gain root on affected systems.

item.title: Order-tracking app Shop abused to push callback phishing attacks

item.title: New macOS malware embeds fake errors to confuse AI analysis tools
item.description: A newly discovered macOS malware dubbed "Gaslight" is designed to confuse AI-assisted malware analysis tools by hiding prompt injection strings and fake debugging data within the executable. [...]...

item.title: Chrome Ad Blocker with 10M+ Installs Found with Dormant Script Injection Capability
item.description:
An analysis of a popular Google Chrome ad block extension for YouTube has uncovered the ability to execute arbitrary JavaScript code.
According to Island, the extension, named Adblock for YouTube (ID...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: No need to hack when it’s leaking: Dialog edition

item.title: ThreatsDay Bulletin: Smart TV Proxyware, 24-Year curl Bug, AI Crime Forums + 13 More Stories
item.description:
It’s dumb out there again.

item.title: Webinar: Why account takeovers remain one of the hardest threats to stop
